scripts.build:python-mcp: pnpm run sync:python-mcp-contracts && uv --cache-dir .uv-cache build --directory python/mcp
scripts.run:python-mcp-cli: pnpm run sync:python-mcp-env && PYTHONPATH=src uv --cache-dir .uv-cache run --directory python/mcp --no-project python -m maa_diagnostic_mcp
scripts.run:python-mcp-server: pnpm run sync:python-mcp-env && PYTHONPATH=src uv --cache-dir .uv-cache run --directory python/mcp --no-project python -m maa_diagnostic_mcp serve-stdio
scripts.test:python-mcp: pnpm run sync:python-mcp-env && uv --cache-dir .uv-cache run --directory python/mcp --no-project python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
scripts.test:python-mcp:project: uv --cache-dir .uv-cache run --directory python/mcp python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
